contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: During the coffee session organized by @⁨Ken Nim - Bay Area⁩ this morning, Martin (_second from right_) surfaced Prospera when he was sharing about smart cities and the gathering he is organizing on 6th October
  
  He also surfaced that there are funds out there that match one for one for every dollar raised to plants trees in the Amazon rainforest
  
  Martin did mentioned if required he is happy to make direct introductions to the person who is actually running Prospera… _from my perspective an overkill…_
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Martin Kirkwood, Ken Nim, Elizabeth Wong
